About this room

Comfortable, Connected & Move-In Ready

A private furnished bedroom is available in a well-maintained apartment within the secure Stellendale Village estate in Kuilsriver. The apartment is fully equipped — from the kitchen with stove, oven and washing machine, to the shared living room and modern study/work area.

WiFi, water and electricity are all shared between tenants, keeping monthly costs simple and fair. The bathroom includes both a bathtub and shower. Simply bring your bags — everything else is ready and waiting.

Ideal for

Post-Graduate Students & Young Professionals

  • Postgraduate / honours / masters students
  • Young working professionals
  • Remote workers needing a study space
  • Someone seeking a secure, quiet environment
  • Non-smoker preferred
